failure_summary: Pre-outcome quality risk detected. See tickets for agent-specific fixes.
likely_causes: Candidate quality is low under current thresholds or market pressure.
Sample size is small; confidence may be overstated.
Learned market policy downgraded planner to watchlist-only (NASDAQ/GREEN, mode=avoid).

tickets.hypothesis: Ranking emphasis may over-weight technical score in weak regime.
tickets.requested_change: Add concentration-aware penalty and enforce diversity gate.
tickets.title: Reduce weak candidate concentration

tickets.hypothesis: Current run size is insufficient for stable inference.
tickets.requested_change: Attach sample-size penalty to planner confidence and show warning banner.
tickets.title: Strengthen small-sample safeguards

tickets.hypothesis: Planner is suppressing active recommendations because the learned market/regime bucket is currently avoid.
tickets.requested_change: Validate whether watchlist-only mode is appropriate for this market/regime bucket and retrain policy once more realized outcomes accumulate.
tickets.title: Review watchlist-only market policy coverage
